_hinweis: Publish-Queue als DATEI (ersetzt Airtable seit 20.07.2026 - Gratis-API-Limit). Stager haengen Eintraege an, poster.py (GitHub Actions) postet faellige und committet den Status zurueck. Zeiten in UTC.

entries.name: EVERY MORNING IS A VOTE
entries.caption:
Every morning is a vote. Snooze votes for the old you. 🖤

You become whoever gets the most votes.

💬 Comment VOTE if tomorrow counts.

(AI voice & visuals)
#morningroutine #discipline #wealth #mindset #allinwealth
